prompt: ok I think I'm done for today. can you run the end-of-session hygiene check on the project at /mnt/d/HealthCare_Digital_Fte? want to make sure everything's clean before I close up
assertions: Output contains a HYGIENE REPORT section with a structured table-like format listing all checks
Output reports the test suite result including a passed count (expect ~271 passed)
Output explicitly checks and reports the CLAUDE.md line count
Output runs a secret scan (grepping for api_key, sk-ant-, etc.) and reports CLEAN or issues
Output runs a PHI leak scan and reports a result
Output includes a final 'Session closed:' status line
